title: The Promise to Grow Stronger: Key Exchange
description: In the Post-War / ASL Flashback storyline, this section centers on Unknown person #12, Unknown person #20, Whitebeard, Unknown person #17, Sanji, Unknown person #22 as the scene develops across pages 17–20.
scene: This scene advances the Post-War / ASL Flashback conflict through Unknown person #12, Unknown person #20, Whitebeard, Unknown person #17, Sanji, focusing on the immediate stakes of the promise to grow stronger: key exchange.

dialogue.speaker: Whitebeard
dialogue.text: ...So you disguised yourself like that, right?

dialogue.speaker: Whitebeard
dialogue.text: There's no reason to be so mean!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #24
dialogue.text: 'Course we don't!! You're always welcome here!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: Ahhhh...! You had all these books?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #20
dialogue.text: ...to achieve here in this country. But

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: I'd do anything to help you...

summary: This scene advances the Post-War / ASL Flashback conflict through Unknown person #12, Unknown person #20, Whitebeard, Unknown person #17, Sanji, focusing on the immediate stakes of the promise to grow stronger: key exchange.
